queries.description: Always set a user in the runtime stage of your Dockerfile. Without it, the container defaults to root, even if earlier build stages define a user.

files.search_key: FROM={{node:14.16}}
files.actual_value: The 'Dockerfile' does not contain any 'USER' instruction

files.search_key: FROM={{postgres:14}}
files.actual_value: The 'Dockerfile' does not contain any 'USER' instruction

queries.description: Using ADD to load external installation scripts could lead to an evil web server leveraging this and loading a malicious script.

files.search_key: FROM={{postgres:14}}.{{ADD config_docker.json ./mattermost/config/config_docker.json}}
files.actual_value: 'ADD' config_docker.json

files.search_key: FROM={{postgres:14}}.{{ADD docker-entry.sh .}}
files.actual_value: 'ADD' docker-entry.sh

queries.query_name: Apt Get Install Pin Version Not Defined
queries.description: When installing a package, its pin version should be defined

files.search_key: FROM={{postgres:14}}.RUN={{apt-get update && apt-get install -y ca-certificates}}
files.actual_value: Package 'ca-certificates' does not have version defined

files.search_key: FROM={{ubuntu:noble-20251013@sha256:c35e29c9450151419d9448b0fd75374fec4fff364a27f176fb458d472dfc9e54 AS builder}}.RUN={{apt-get update   && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install --no-install-recommends -y   ca-certificates   curl   media-types   mailcap   unrtf   wv   poppler-utils   tidy   tzdata   && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*}}
files.actual_value: Package 'curl' does not have version defined

queries.description: Always tag the version of an image explicitly

files.search_key: FROM={{gcr.io/distroless/base-debian12}}
files.actual_value: FROM gcr.io/distroless/base-debian12'

queries.query_name: Not Using JSON In CMD And ENTRYPOINT Arguments
queries.description: Ensure that we are using JSON in the CMD and ENTRYPOINT Arguments

files.search_key: FROM={{postgres:14}}.{{ENTRYPOINT ./docker-entry.sh}}
files.expected_value: {{ENTRYPOINT ./docker-entry.sh}} should be in the JSON Notation
files.actual_value: {{ENTRYPOINT ./docker-entry.sh}} isn't in JSON Notation

queries.description: It is considered a best practice for every executable in a container to be owned by the root user even if it is executed by a non-root user, only execution permissions are required on the file, not ownership

files.search_key: FROM={{gcr.io/distroless/base-debian12}}.{{COPY --from=builder --chown=2000:2000 /etc/ssl/certs /etc/ssl/certs}}
files.actual_value: The 'Dockerfile' contains the 'chown' flag

files.search_key: FROM={{gcr.io/distroless/base-debian12}}.{{COPY --from=builder --chown=2000:2000 /mattermost /mattermost}}
files.actual_value: The 'Dockerfile' contains the 'chown' flag

queries.query_name: Curl or Wget Instead of Add
queries.description: Use of Curl or Wget should be done instead of Add to fetch packages from remote URLs due to the use of Add being strongly discouraged

files.search_key: FROM={{postgres:14}}.{{ADD https://releases.mattermost.com/${MATTERMOST_VERSION}/mattermost-team-${MATTERMOST_VERSION}-linux-amd64.tar.gz .}}
files.actual_value: 'ADD' https://releases.mattermost.com/${MATTERMOST_VERSION}/mattermost-team-${MATTERMOST_VERSION}-linux-amd64.tar.gz

queries.description: Ensure that HEALTHCHECK is being used. The HEALTHCHECK instruction tells Docker how to test a container to check that it is still working

files.search_key: FROM={{node:14.16}}
files.actual_value: Dockerfile doesn't contain instruction 'HEALTHCHECK'

files.search_key: FROM={{postgres:14}}
files.actual_value: Dockerfile doesn't contain instruction 'HEALTHCHECK'

queries.query_name: Multiple RUN, ADD, COPY, Instructions Listed
queries.description: Multiple commands (RUN, COPY, ADD) should be grouped in order to reduce the number of layers.

files.search_key: FROM={{gcr.io/distroless/base-debian12}}.{{COPY --from=builder /usr/lib/libpoppler.so* /usr/lib/}}
files.expected_value: There isn´t any COPY instruction that could be grouped
files.actual_value: There are COPY instructions that could be grouped

queries.description: Check if any apt-get installs don't use '--no-install-recommends' flag to avoid installing additional packages.

files.search_key: FROM={{node:14.16}}.{{RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y make gcc nasm libpng-dev}}
files.expected_value: 'RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y make gcc nasm libpng-dev' uses '--no-install-recommends' flag to avoid installing additional packages
files.actual_value: 'RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y make gcc nasm libpng-dev' does not use '--no-install-recommends' flag to avoid installing additional packages

files.search_key: FROM={{postgres:14}}.{{RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y ca-certificates}}
files.expected_value: 'RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y ca-certificates' uses '--no-install-recommends' flag to avoid installing additional packages
files.actual_value: 'RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y ca-certificates' does not use '--no-install-recommends' flag to avoid installing additional packages

queries.query_name: Apt Get Install Lists Were Not Deleted
queries.description: After using apt-get install, it is needed to delete apt-get lists

files.search_key: FROM={{postgres:14}}.RUN={{apt-get update && apt-get install -y ca-certificates}}
files.expected_value: After using apt-get install, the apt-get lists should be deleted
files.actual_value: After using apt-get install, the apt-get lists were not deleted

files.search_key: FROM={{ubuntu:noble-20251013@sha256:c35e29c9450151419d9448b0fd75374fec4fff364a27f176fb458d472dfc9e54 AS builder}}.RUN={{apt-get update   && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install --no-install-recommends -y   ca-certificates   curl   media-types   mailcap   unrtf   wv   poppler-utils   tidy   tzdata   && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*}}
files.expected_value: After using apt-get install, the apt-get lists should be deleted
files.actual_value: After using apt-get install, the apt-get lists were not deleted

files.search_key: FROM={{node:14.16}}.RUN={{apt-get update && apt-get install -y make gcc nasm libpng-dev}}
files.expected_value: After using apt-get install, the apt-get lists should be deleted
files.actual_value: After using apt-get install, the apt-get lists were not deleted
